## Use Case

Describe the problem you're trying to solve or the workflow you want to improve.

## Proposed Solution

What would you like to see? Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you've thought about.

- [ ] New MCP tool

- [ ] New skill
